zh-CN.name: 三轮车
zh-CN.intro: 三轮车是一辆有三个轮子的小车，小朋友可以用脚踩踏板，让它跑起来。它很稳，不容易摔倒，是小朋友的好伙伴。

story.title: 🚲小三轮的一天
story.body: 小三轮车叫小红，每天陪小明出去玩。今天，妈妈请小明帮忙，送一盒饼干给隔壁的王奶奶。小明把饼干放进车篮里，骑上小红出发啦。路上，小红轻轻地颤了一下，但很快就稳稳地往前。经过小花园时，他们停下来，闻了闻香香的花儿。到了王奶奶家，奶奶接过饼干，高兴得眼睛眯成了月牙，还给了小明一个大苹果。小明把苹果也放进车篮，和小红开开心心回了家。晚上，小红在院子里休息，梦里还在叮铃铃地响着铃铛，好想明天再去冒险呀！

knowledge.title: 为什么三轮车很稳呢？
knowledge.body: 三轮车有三个轮子，像一个小三角形，所以不容易歪倒。小朋友学骑车，从三轮车开始，又安全又有趣。骑三轮车还能锻炼腿力，让身体更棒哦。

en.name: Tricycle
en.intro: A tricycle is a small vehicle with three wheels. Children push the pedals with their feet to make it go. It is very stable and doesn't tip over easily, making it a great friend for kids.

story.title: 🚲 Little Red Tricycle's Day
story.body: Little Red is a tricycle. Every day, she goes out with her friend, Xiao Ming. One morning, Xiao Ming's mom asked him to deliver a box of cookies to Granny Wang next door. Xiao Ming put the cookies in the basket and pedaled Little Red. The tricycle wobbled a little at first but then went smoothly. They passed a garden with pretty flowers. Xiao Ming stopped to smell them. Then they continued to Granny Wang's house. Granny was very happy and gave Xiao Ming a big red apple. Xiao Ming and Little Red went home, feeling proud. At night, Little Red rested in the yard, dreaming about tomorrow's adventure.

knowledge.title: Why is a tricycle so stable?
knowledge.body: A tricycle has three wheels, forming a triangle shape, so it doesn't fall over easily. When children learn to ride, starting with a tricycle is safe and fun. Riding a tricycle also exercises leg muscles and makes you stronger.
